message:
fix(analytics): add missing error_code to auth error emitters (#10924)

Four auth-related emit functions (emitAgentTokenFailure, emitWsAuthMissing,
emitSseAuthFailure, emitSessionRefreshFailure) sent ksc_error events with
error_category but no error_code field. GA4 reported these as '(not set)',
making it impossible to filter or diagnose them. This accounted for 390+
errors on /clusters alone in the past 48 hours.

Add error_code matching the existing error_category value to all four
functions so they appear correctly in GA4 error reports.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
